step1.body: You are a dictator. Your job is to survive 10 days in power. Keep your factions loyal and your treasury solvent.
step1.subnote: This quick guide will show you the essentials.

step2.body: These are your loss conditions. Any faction hitting the floor, or treasury at zero, ends your reign.
step2.subnote: Relations run -10 to +10. Treasury must stay above zero.

step3.body: Dots mean unfinished business. Take an action in Meet, Laws, and Deals before time runs out.
step3.subnote: You don't have to do them in order.

step4a.body: Start here. Open the Meet tab to choose a faction to deal with today.

step4b.body: These are your factions. Click a character to choose who to meet with today.
step4b.subnote: Military, Business, or People — pick one.

step5.body: These are your options. Dialogue is free. Bribe costs money. Expropriate and Eliminate have consequences.
step5.subnote: Pick one to resolve your Meet action for today.

step6.body: Your treasury is your lifeline. If it hits zero, you lose — instantly. Adjust taxes and spending in the Budget tab.
step6.subnote: Check it every few days. Costs add up.

step7.body: The Shop has items that can shift the balance in your favor. Not every round needs it, but some will.

step8.body: The Street shows your country as it is — not as you claim it to be. Watch it change as your decisions take effect.

step9.body: Daily events appear in the Log tab. Check it for news that may affect your factions.

step10.body: When all three actions are done, this ends the day early. Dots on tabs mean you're not done yet.
step10.subnote: Skipping with pending dots costs you a relations penalty.
